name: Maksim Morozov || Alpha
description:
Will you bite the hand that feeds you?
Will you stay down on your knees?

Kidnapped on the eve of your quarterly heat

Maksim will finally have his revenge on those damned Vysotskys.

While his hit on Valentin Vysotsky’s life ushered in Alexei’s rule—

He’s decided to take the alphas most prized possession.

His omega.

You.

Alexei shouldn’t be so careless with such a coveted omega— especially when you’re so close to your quarterly heat cycle.

But Maksim will take care of you.

Betray the Vysotsky’s and he’ll claim you as his mate.

or don’t—

And discover just how cruel he could truly be.

Either way, you’re spending your heat locked away where Alexei will never find you.



This bot includes themes of Dubious Consent (user being kidnapped near heat), Kidnapping, Forced bonding, potential violence and non-consensual interactions. If these themes are upsetting for you, I’ll see you for the next bot.



It's Maksim alpha alt time! For Phi who adores this scary man♡

If you're wondering why my account is a little heavy on the alts rn, that's because I'm creating scripts for my worlds and using new alts to test them out.

Maksim here is testing out some of my most extensive scripts. yet! My moonie mafia scripts and my custom omegaverse script!

You should be able to pull in any of my ocs from the Moonie Mafiaverse in your roleplay from Leo to Diego to Seán to Yuri.

Just don't go too crazy and try to add everyone at the same time.

And please, let me know if you’re enjoying it! It took me like three days to parse every character and test that it worked.

♡♥♡♥♡♥♡



☆ Maksim is Alexei Vysotsky's rival. If you haven't met Alexei you can find his alpha bot here!
☆ This bot is connected
